questions.explanation: Congress makes laws; the executive enforces; the judicial interprets.

questions.q: How many electoral votes are needed to win the presidency?
questions.explanation: 270 of the 538 electoral votes are needed to win.

questions.q: How many Supreme Court justices are there?
questions.explanation: The Supreme Court has nine justices.
The Department of State issues U.S. passports.

questions.q: Where should you look for current officeholders and fees?
questions.explanation: Time-sensitive facts live in Appendix H and should be verified.
